<marimo-island
    data-app-id="jb-e92b845b2142"
    data-cell-idx="1"
    data-reactive="true"
>
    <marimo-cell-output>
    <marimo-mime-renderer data-mime='"application/vnd.marimo+error"' data-data='[{"type":"exception","msg":"An ancestor raised an exception (ModuleNotFoundError): ","exception_type":"Ancestor raised","raising_cell":"jbe92b845b2142Hbol","traceback":null}]'></marimo-mime-renderer>
    </marimo-cell-output>
    <marimo-ui-element object-id='f76a4966-932f-3ffb-b6a0-b6d1b67dd8ab' random-id='f76a4966-932f-3ffb-b6a0-b6d1b67dd8ab'><marimo-code-editor data-initial-value='"def psi_n(x, n):\n    \"\"\"Time-independent wavefunction for a particle in a box.\"\"\"\n    L = 1 # set box length\n\n    return np.sqrt(2/L) * np.sin(n * np.pi * x / L)\n\ndef T_n(t, n):\n    \"\"\"Time dependence factor for the wavefunction.\"\"\"\n    L = 1 # set box length\n    m, hbar = 1, 1 # set atomic units\n    En = n**2 * np.pi**2 * hbar**2 / (2 * m * L**2)\n\n    return np.exp(-1j * En * t / hbar)\n\ndef psi_combined(x, t, L, c1=1, c2=1, n1=1, n2=2):\n    \"\"\"Time-dependent wavefunction for a linear superposition of two states of PIB\"\"\"\n\n    return c1 * psi_n(x, n1) * T_n(t, n1) + c2 * psi_n(x, n2) * T_n(t, n2)"' data-label='null' data-language='"python"' data-placeholder='""' data-disabled='false' data-show-copy-button='true' data-debounce='false'></marimo-code-editor></marimo-ui-element>
</marimo-island>

<marimo-island
    data-app-id="jb-e92b845b2142"
    data-cell-idx="2"
    data-reactive="true"
>
    <marimo-cell-output>
    <marimo-mime-renderer data-mime='"application/vnd.marimo+error"' data-data='[{"type":"exception","msg":"An ancestor raised an exception (ModuleNotFoundError): ","exception_type":"Ancestor raised","raising_cell":"jbe92b845b2142Hbol","traceback":null}]'></marimo-mime-renderer>
    </marimo-cell-output>
    <marimo-ui-element object-id='47beb8ae-03c9-7af2-8694-0cfe335fa0c7' random-id='47beb8ae-03c9-7af2-8694-0cfe335fa0c7'><marimo-code-editor data-initial-value='"def plot_wavefunction(t=0, c1=1, c2=1, n1=1, n2=1):\n\n    L = 1.0\n    x = np.linspace(0, L, 1000)\n\n    psi_squared_x = np.abs(psi_combined(x, t, c1, c2, n1, n2))**2\n\n    plt.plot(x, psi_squared_x )\n\n    plt.title(f\"Probability density at t={t:.2f} with c1={c1:.2f} and c2={c2:.2f}\")\n    plt.xlabel('x')\n    plt.ylabel('$|\\Psi(x, t)|^2$')\n    plt.grid(True)\n    plt.ylim([0, 10])  # Adjust the y limit to suit the range of the probability density\n    plt.show()"' data-label='null' data-language='"python"' data-placeholder='""' data-disabled='false' data-show-copy-button='true' data-debounce='false'></marimo-code-editor></marimo-ui-element>
</marimo-island>
